//: Base TS config. Apps extend this and add their own `references`. `packages/shared` adds `composite: true`. We use NodeNext module resolution (see ADR-0001): it is the strictest option and works natively for the Node server; Vite/Electron consume the ESM build of `packages/shared` via the package `exports` map. target/lib = ES2024 to match the Node 24 LTS runtime floor (ADR-0012).
